Preview:

Guest 1337 yawned as his eyes slowly fluttered open. Normally, he'd have no issues sleeping through the entire night with no interruptions, but his mouth felt a little dry. A little annoying, but it was no big deal. He rubbed his blurry eyes a bit, clearing up his vision before he squinted his heavy eyes to see through the darkness. Considering he just woke up, his eyes were already adjusted tot he darkness. And besides, it was his own home. If he didn't know the layout by now, then that'd just be plain embarrassing.
